ores-desc: Muuji dhibcaha dib u eegista otomaatiga ah ee is-dhexgalka
ores-damaging-filter: $1 wax ka-beddel oo u badan kuwo wanaagsan
ores-damaging-title: Wax ka beddelkan wuxuu u baahan yahay dib u eegis
ores-damaging-legend: Wax ka beddelkan waxaa laga yaabaa inuu leeyahay dhibaatooyin waana in dib loo eego ([https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/ORES_review_tool macluumaad dheeraad ah])
ores-hide-nondamaging-filter: Qari wax ka beddelada u badan kuwa wanaagsan
ores-pref-damaging-flag: Ku muuji midabyo wax ka beddelada u badan kuwa dhibaato leh iyo "{{int:ores-damaging-letter}}" ee "u baahan dib u eegis"
ores-damaging-maybebad: Waxay yeelan karaan dhibaatooyin (waxay calaamadisaa inta badan wax-ka-beddelada dhibka leh laakiin waxay keentaa kuwa badan oo khalad ah)
ores-damaging-likelybad: Waxay u badan tahay inay dhibaatooyin leeyihiin (suurtagal dhexdhexaad ah)
ores-damaging-verylikelybad: Aad bay u badan tahay inay dhibaatooyin leeyihiin (waxay calaamadisaa khaladaad yar laakiin waxay heshaa boqolkiiba yar % oo wax ka beddelada dhibaato leh)
ores-help-damaging-pref: Beddel dejinta "xadka" si aad uga dhigto xulashooyinka hoose kuwo ballaaran ama kuwo aad u xulasho badan.
ores-rcfilters-ores-conflicts-logactions: Shaandhaynta "{{int:rcfilters-filter-logactions-label}}" waxay isku dhacaysaa mid ama ka badan shaandhaynta Tayada Wax-ku-darka ama Ujeedada Isticmaalaha. Saadaasha tayada iyo ujeedada lama heli karo falalka diiwaanka ku jira. Shaandhaynta is khilaafsan waxaa lagu calaamadeeyay qaybta Shaandhaynta Firfircoon ee kore.
ores-rcfilters-logactions-conflicts-ores: Shaandhayntan waxay isku dhacaysaa mid ama ka badan shaandhaynta Tayada Wax-ku-darka ama Ujeedada Isticmaalaha. Saadaasha tayada iyo ujeedada lama heli karo falalka diiwaanka ku jira.
ores-rcfilters-damaging-whats-this-heade: Ku saabsan saadaasha tayada wax ku darka
ores-rcfilters-damaging-whats-this-body: Saadaashan waxaa sameeya adeeg barasho mashiin ah oo lagu tababaray xog weyn oo wax ka-beddelo ah oo ay qiimeeyeen tifaftirayaal bini’aadan ah. Shaandhaynaha adag oo sax ah waxay helaan khaladaad yar oo been ah laakiin waxay seegaan wax badan oo ay beegsanayaan. Shaandhaynaha aan sidaas u saxnayn waxay helaan wax badan oo ay beegsanayaan, laakiin sidoo kale waxay keenaan khaladaad badan oo been ah.
ores-rcfilters-damaging-conflicts-logact: Saadaasha tayada wax ku darka lama heli karo noocyada qaar ee isbeddelka, sidaas darteed shaandhayntani waxay isku dhacaysaa shaandhaynta Nooca Isbeddelka ee soo socda {{PLURAL:$2|shaandhayn|shaandhayno}}: $1
ores-rcfilters-damaging-likelygood-label: Aad bay u badan tahay inuu wanaagsan yahay
ores-rcfilters-damaging-likelygood-desc: Aad u sax ah marka uu helayo ku dhowaad dhammaan wax ka beddelada aan dhibaato lahayn.
ores-rcfilters-damaging-maybebad-desc: Waxay heshaa inta badan wax ka beddelada khaldan ama waxyeellada leh laakiin saxnaanteedu waa hooseysaa.
ores-rcfilters-damaging-likelybad-label: Waxay u badan tahay inay dhibaatooyin leeyihiin
ores-rcfilters-damaging-likelybad-desc-l: Saxnaanta dhexdhexaadka ah, waxay heshaa qayb dhexdhexaad ah oo wax-ka beddelada dhibaato leh.
ores-rcfilters-damaging-likelybad-desc-h: Saxnaan sare, waxay heshaa inta badan wax ka beddelada dhibaato leh.
ores-rcfilters-damaging-verylikelybad-la: Aad bay u badan tahay inay dhibaatooyin leeyihiin
ores-rcfilters-damaging-verylikelybad-de: Aad u sax ah marka uu helayo wax ka beddelada si cad u khaldan ama waxyeellada leh.
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-whats-this-body: Saadaashan ku saabsan niyadda wanaagsan ee isticmaalayaasha waxaa sameeya adeeg barasho mashiin ah oo lagu tababaray xog weyn oo wax ka beddelo ah oo ay qiimeeyeen tifaftirayaal bini’aadan ah. Shaandhaynaha adag oo sax ah waxay helaan khaladaad yar oo been ah laakiin waxay seegaan wax badan oo ay beegsanayaan. Shaandhaynaha aan sidaas u saxnayn waxay helaan wax badan oo ay beegsanayaan, laakiin sidoo kale waxay keenaan khaladaad badan oo been ah.
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-conflicts-logac: Saadaasha ujeedada isticmaalaha lama heli karo noocyada qaar ee isbeddelka, sidaas darteed shaandhayntani waxay isku dhacaysaa shaandhaynta Nooca Isbeddelka ee soo socda {{PLURAL:$2|shaandhayn|shaandhayno}}: $1
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-good-label: Aad bay u badan tahay niyad wanaag
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-good-desc: Aad u sax ah marka uu helayo ku dhowaad dhammaan wax ka beddelada niyad wanaagga ah.
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-maybebad-label: Waxay u badan tahay inay tahay niyad xumo
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-maybebad-desc: Waxay heshaa inta badan wax-ka-beddelada niyad xumada ah laakiin saxnaanteedu waa hooseysaa.
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-bad-label: Waxay u badan tahay niyad xumo
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-bad-desc-low: Saxnaanta dhexdhexaadka ah, waxay heshaa qayb dhexdhexaad ah oo wax-ka beddelada niyad xumada ah.
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-bad-desc-high: Saxnaanta dhexdhexaadka ah, waxay heshaa inta badan wax-ka beddelada niyad xumada ah.
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-verylikelybad-l: Aad bay u badan tahay niyad xumo
ores-rcfilters-goodfaith-verylikelybad-d: Aad u sax ah marka uu helayo wax-ka-beddelada niyad-xumada ah ee si cad u muuqda.
ores-rcfilters-revertrisklanguageagnosti: Khatar ah in dib loo celiyo
Ku saabsan saadaasha khatarta dib u celinta

Saadaashan ku saabsan khatarta dib u celinta waxay ku saleysan tahay adeeg barasho mashiin ah oo isticmaala waxa ku jira dib-u-eegista iyo xogta meta si uu u saadaaliyo khatarta in dib loo celiyo dib u eegista

Saadaasha khatarta dib-u-celinta lama heli karo noocyada qaar ee isbeddelka, sidaas darteed shaandhayntani waxay isku dhacaysaa shaandhaynta Nooca Isbeddelka ee soo socda {{PLURAL:$2|shaandhayn|shaandhayno}}: $1
Waxay u badan tahay in dib loo celiyo
Waxay ogaataa dib u eegisyo laga yaabo in dib loo celiyo, laakiin ma qiimeyso ujeedada isticmaalaha.
ores-pref-highlight: Ku muuji midabyo wax ka beddelada u badan kuwa dhibaato leh iyo "{{int:ores-damaging-letter}}" ee "u baahan dib u eegis"
ores-pref-rc-hidenondamaging: Muuji kaliya wax-ka-beddelada u badan kuwa dhibaato leh (oo qari wax-ka-beddelada u badan kuwa wanaagsan)
ores-pref-watchlist-hidenondamaging: Muuji kaliya wax-ka-beddelada u badan kuwa dhibaato leh (oo qari wax ka beddelada u badan kuwa wanaagsan)
prefs-ores-wl: Qiimaynta dib u eegista ee Liiska Ilaalinta iyo Wax ku darka
prefs-ores-rc: Qiimaynta dib u eegista ee Isbeddellada dhow iyo Isbeddellada la xiriira
ores-api-show-note: Marka la isticmaalayo <kbd>oresreview</kbd> ama <kbd>!oresreview</kbd>, dib u eegisyada aan lahayn dhibco (tusaale dib u eegisyo aad u duug ah) waxaa loo tixgeliyaa inay aan u baahnayn dib u eegis xitaa haddii ay u baahan lahaayeen dib u eegis haddii la qiimeeyo.
